creator: hvo.pm@xs4all.nl
text:
root@rwrt:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD rwrt.nl 10.3-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p11 #0: Mon Oct 24 18:49:24 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

root@rwrt:~ # cat /etc/make.conf
OPTIONS_UNSET+=X11
OPTIONS_UNSET+=CUPS
DEVELOPER=YES
WITH_PKGNG=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes


The build log is at http://rwrt.nl/buildlog.txt
